texto: Marriage is all about knowing the ins and outs and the intimate details, and your wife is supposed to be the person you know best. But my brother and I think alike, know everything about one another, and when we get together, we block everything else out. Nothing exists in our world except for us.
explicacao: Citação de Jon Heder sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Marriage is all about knowing the ins and outs and the intimate details, and your wife is suppose…” articula reflexao, inspiracional, brother em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como casamento e inspiracao.
